scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.dev:test: concurrently "ENABLE_LOCAL_TEST_MODE=true LOCAL_TEST_TOKEN=local-test LOCAL_TEST_REPO_OWNER=demo LOCAL_TEST_REPO_NAME=course-demo LOCAL_TEST_REPO_PATH=./test-repo/course-demo FRONTEND_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 PORT=4000 npm run dev --prefix backend" "VITE_ENABLE_LOCAL_TEST_MODE=true VITE_BACKEND_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000 VITE_LOCAL_TEST_TOKEN=local-test VITE_LOCAL_TEST_REPO_OWNER=demo VITE_LOCAL_TEST_REPO_NAME=course-demo npm run dev --prefix frontend -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 3000"
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.verify:deploy: npm run verify:env && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:e2e:sanity
scripts.verify:deploy:strict: npm run verify:env:strict && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:e2e:sanity
